meta.title: Unsolicited Response Show Live
meta.description: Dale rants a bit on the Level 0/1 issue and then takes your questions and comments on OT and ICS Security. There may be a few surprise guests on as well.

errors: Download failed - yt-dlp error: ERROR: [youtube] zn_JxXCrHZo: Unable to download API page: ('Unable to connect to proxy', OSError('Tunnel connection failed: 402 Payment Required')) (caused by ProxyError("('Unable to connect to proxy', OSError('Tunnel connection failed: 402 Payment Required'))")); please report this issue on  https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/issues?q= , filling out the appropriate issue template.
